title: Entech Sales & Service, LLC ransomware incident

extortion.description: The company's services offer expertise in areas like building automation, card access systems, chemical water treatment, rental heating, ventilation, air conditioning, generator equipment, and other commercial support.We are ready to upload more than 174 GB of essential corporate documents such as: corporate NDA’s, financial data (audits, paymentdetails, reports), contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees and customers, etc.
